characterSelect.title: LootDive
characterSelect.subtitle: Select Character
characterSelect.emptyHint: Create a new character to begin
characterSelect.deleteConfirmMessage:
Delete "{{name}}"?
This action cannot be undone.

retreatConfirm.title: Confirm Retreat
retreatConfirm.message:
Are you sure you want to retreat?
Gained EXP will be lost, but items can be kept.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.bulkSellConfirmMessage:
Sell all {{count}} {{slot}} items?
This action cannot be undone.

sound.title: Sound Settings
sound.description: Toggle BGM and sound effects ON/OFF

categoryFilter.title: Category Filter
categoryFilter.description: Only collect drops from enabled categories

modCountFilter.title: Minimum MOD Count
modCountFilter.description: Only collect items with this many MODs or more (0 to disable)

tierFilter.title: MOD Tier Filter
tierFilter.description: Only collect items with at least one MOD at or below this tier (Tier 1 is highest quality)

battleSpeed.title: Battle Speed
battleSpeed.description: Change the speed of battle progression
battleSpeed.premiumHint: 3x speed can be unlocked with an invite code

inviteCode.title: Invite Code
inviteCode.description: Share invite codes with friends to unlock 3x speed for both of you
inviteCode.receivedFromLink: The invite code from the link has been filled in

error.ownCode: You cannot use your own code
error.alreadyUsed: This code has already been used
error.alreadyRedeemed: You have already entered an invite code

inviteCode.suspended: Invite code feature is temporarily unavailable

inviteLink.title: Invite Code Received
inviteLink.description: We read an invite code from the link. Apply it to unlock 3x speed.

grassland.name: Beginner's Meadow
grassland.description: A peaceful grassland where adventurers begin their journey. Home to weak monsters.

cave.name: Underground Cave
cave.description: A dark cave deep underground. Intermediate monsters lurk within.

ruins.name: Forgotten Ruins
ruins.description: Ancient civilization ruins. A dangerous place where powerful monsters roam.

goblin_fort.name: Goblin Fortress
goblin_fort.description: A massive fortress built by goblins. The Goblin King rules in its depths.

bandit_hideout.name: Bandit Hideout
bandit_hideout.description: A hideout for mountain bandits, piled high with stolen goods.

vampire_mansion.name: Vampire Mansion
vampire_mansion.description: An eerie mansion in the night. Ruled by an immortal noble.

underwater_cave.name: Underwater Cave
underwater_cave.description: A mysterious cave in the deep sea. Aquatic monsters guard their territory.

orc_fortress.name: Orc Fortress
orc_fortress.description: A massive fortress ruled by orcs and trolls. Savage warriors await.

demon_castle.name: Demon Castle
demon_castle.description: The dark lord's castle where shadows swirl. Powerful demons guard their master.

ice_cave.name: Frozen Cavern
ice_cave.description: An icy cave deep within the permafrost. Frigid monsters dwell here.

volcano.name: Blazing Volcano
volcano.description: A scorching labyrinth inside an active volcano. Fire creatures inhabit it.

dark_forest.name: Abyssal Forest
dark_forest.description: A lightless dark forest. Ancient beasts lurk within.

sky_tower.name: Sky Tower
sky_tower.description: A mystical tower piercing the clouds. Celestial guardians await.

hell_gate.name: Hell's Gate
hell_gate.description: A forbidden gate leading to the underworld. Hell's gatekeepers block intruders.

dragon_nest.name: Dragon's Lair
dragon_nest.description: A legendary nest where ancient dragons sleep. The mightiest dragon species dwell here.

sacred_temple.name: Divine Temple
sacred_temple.description: A sacred temple protected by servants of the gods.

chaos_realm.name: Chaos Realm
chaos_realm.description: A chaotic world between reality and void. All laws are distorted here.

final_land.name: Land of Endings
final_land.description: The final frontier at world's end. The ultimate being awaits.

dimensional_rush_1.name: Dimensional Rush I
dimensional_rush_1.description: Dimensional labyrinth. Defeat the Goblin King on floor 50.

dimensional_rush_2.name: Dimensional Rush II
dimensional_rush_2.description: Dimensional labyrinth. Defeat the Bandit Leader on floor 70.

dimensional_rush_3.name: Dimensional Rush III
dimensional_rush_3.description: Dimensional labyrinth. Defeat the Vampire on floor 90.

dimensional_rush_4.name: Dimensional Rush IV
dimensional_rush_4.description: Dimensional labyrinth. Defeat the Kraken on floor 110.

dimensional_rush_5.name: Dimensional Rush V
dimensional_rush_5.description: Dimensional labyrinth. Defeat the Demon Lord on floor 120.

dimensional_rush_6.name: Dimensional Rush VI
dimensional_rush_6.description: Final dimensional layer. Defeat the True Final Boss on floor 200.

dimensional_corridor.name: Dimensional Corridor
dimensional_corridor.description: An endless corridor between dimensions. Enemies grow stronger the deeper you go.

uber_goblin_king.name: Uber Goblin King
uber_goblin_king.description: The Goblin King awakened in another dimension.

uber_uber_goblin_king.name: UberUber Goblin King
uber_uber_goblin_king.description: The ultimately awakened Goblin King. Only those who have defeated all Uber bosses may challenge.

uber_uber_bandit_leader.name: UberUber Bandit Leader
uber_uber_bandit_leader.description: The ultimate assassin. Only those who have defeated all Uber bosses may challenge.

uber_bandit_leader.name: Uber Bandit Leader
uber_bandit_leader.description: The Bandit Leader enhanced by dimensional power.

uber_vampire.name: Uber Vampire
uber_vampire.description: A blood-starved vampire from another dimension.

uber_kraken.name: Uber Kraken
uber_kraken.description: A colossal creature ruling the dimensional seas.

uber_demon_lord.name: Uber Demon Lord
uber_demon_lord.description: The Demon Lord resurrected by dimensional power.

uber_true_final_boss.name: Uber True Final Boss
uber_true_final_boss.description: The being that brings true endings.

goblin_king.name: Goblin Roar
goblin_king.shieldDesc: 20% damage reduction for 2 turns, crit and poison chance -50%
goblin_king.shieldDescUberUber: 20% damage reduction, crit and poison chance -50% (permanent from battle start)
goblin_king.warlordDesc: +30% attack speed, recover 500 HP on hit (triggers below 50% HP)
goblin_king.warlordDescUberUber: +30% attack speed, recover 500 HP on hit (permanent from battle start)
goblin_king.kingsSlamDesc: A devastating ATK×3 strike every 10 attacks
goblin_king.kingsRoarDesc: Cleanses poison and ignite every 3 attacks

bandit_leader.name: Bear Trap
bandit_leader.bearTrapDescUberUber: Player attack speed -30% (permanent from battle start)
bandit_leader.shadowBindDesc: Healing permanently reduced by 50% (triggers below 50% HP)
bandit_leader.shadowBindDescUberUber: Healing reduced by 25% (permanent from battle start)
bandit_leader.twinStrikeDesc: Triggers a follow-up with the same damage as the main attack on every attack
bandit_leader.shadowGarroteDesc: Freezes the player for 0.5s every 10 attacks

vampire.name: Blood Feast
vampire.bloodFeastDesc: Recover 150% of damage dealt on next attack
vampire.nightFeastDesc: Applies poison to player at battle start
vampire.crimsonPactDesc: Recover HP based on damage dealt (triggers below 50% HP)

kraken.name: Tsunami
kraken.tsunamiDesc: Next attack +50% damage, player takes +30% damage for 1 turn
kraken.deepEmbraceDesc: -20% attack speed, -30% healing for 3 turns (triggers below 50% HP)

demon_lord.name: Death Hand
demon_lord.deathHandDesc: -30% healing for 2 turns, applies poison to player
demon_lord.crownDesc: Enables HP recovery on hit (triggers below 50% HP)

battleLog.title: Battle Log
battleLog.poisonAppliedEnemy: Applied poison to {{enemy}}! ({{damage}} damage x {{turns}} turns){{stacks}}
battleLog.poisonAppliedPlayer: Poison applied! Player takes {{damage}} damage x {{turns}} turns!{{stacks}}
battleLog.warlordEnrage: [Warlord] Activated! Attack Speed+20%, HP on Hit+300

passiveTree.title: Passive Tree
passiveTree.zoomHint: Pinch to zoom / Double tap to reset
passiveTree.placeholder: Tap a node to view details

poison_key1.name: Venom Wielder
poison_key1.description: Poison Chance +10%, Poison Damage +20%, Poison Lifesteal +30%

poison_final2.name: Pure Poison [Keystone]
poison_final2.description: No longer deal direct damage. Poison Damage 50% more

crit_final2.name: Executioner
crit_final2.description: HP on Crit +150, ATK 15% more, Damage Absorption on Crit +30%

guard_regen_ks.name: Wellspring of Life
guard_regen_ks.description: Damage Reduction +2%, HP Regen +300/s, HP on Hit +100

guard_retal_ks.name: Steel Retaliation
guard_retal_ks.description: Damage Reduction +2%, Reflect 30% of DEF as damage when hit

regen_final1.name: Phoenix Blessing
regen_final1.description: HP 25% more, HP Regen per Turn +25

ignite_key1.name: Slow Flame
ignite_key1.description: [Keystone] Ignite Chance +6%, Damage Reduction +10% when AS < 0.8

ignite_final1.name: Blazing Pinnacle
ignite_final1.description: Ignite Chance +6%, Ignite Damage 25% more, HP +10% increased

ignite_final2.name: Spreading Flames
ignite_final2.description: [Keystone] Ignite Chance +6%, Ignite Spread - When ignited enemy dies, ignite transfers to next enemy. DEF +10% increased

dropRate.title: Drop Rate UP
dropRate.longDescription:
+1% unique drop rate
1.5x item drop chance

tierBoost.title: Higher Tier UP
tierBoost.description: Higher quality item drop rate UP for 30 min
tierBoost.longDescription:
Higher T1-T3 quality tier drop rate
Normally T4-5 are most common

boost.adShowFailed: Failed to show ad. Please try again later.
boost.adNotReady: Ad is not ready. Please wait and try again.
boost.tooltipDescription: Watch a video ad to get 30 minutes of boost

modFilter.tooltipDescription: Automatically filter out unwanted items. Customize filter settings to keep only the loot you need.

uberTreeTooltip.title: Uber Passive Tree Unlocked!
uberTreeTooltip.description: Defeat Uber bosses to earn points and grow your powerful Uber Passive Tree

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Purchase Premium Features
shop.notAvailableMessage: This item is currently not available

inventoryExpansion.name: Inventory Expansion
inventoryExpansion.description: Increases inventory item limit from {{from}} to {{to}}

storageExpansion.name: Storage Expansion
storageExpansion.description: Increases storage item limit from {{from}} to {{to}}

tierFilter.name: Low Tier Filter
tierFilter.description: Prevents low quality items (T8-T10) from dropping

permanentBoost.name: Permanent Boost
permanentBoost.description: Unique drop rate +1%, item drop rate x1.5, and increased high-tier (T1-T3) drop rates are always active

inviteCodeBanner.title: Unlock 3x Speed for Free
inviteCodeBanner.description: Share your invite code from Settings to unlock 3x speed

premiumBundle.name: Premium Bundle
premiumBundle.description: Includes Inventory Expansion, Storage Expansion, Low Tier Filter, Permanent Boost, and Character Slots at a discounted price

forceUpdate.updateMessage:
A new version is available.
Please update to continue.
forceUpdate.maintenanceMessage:
The app is currently under maintenance.
Please try again later.
